ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the metrics belong */,
  "game_ip" REAL /* Innings pitched by the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "ra9" REAL /* Runs Above 9 for the player */,
  "ra9_opportunity" REAL /* Opportunity rating for RA9 */,
  "ra9_defensive" REAL /* Defensive rating for RA9 */,
  "ra9_role" INTEGER /* Role of the player in RA9 calculations */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement for the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement for the team */,
  "raa" REAL /* Runs Above Average for the team */,
  "waa" REAL /* Wins Above Average for the team */,
  "gm_li" REAL /* Game likelihood index */,
  "team_batting_average" REAL /* Team batting average */,
  "team_on_base_percentage" REAL /* Team on-base percentage */,
  "team_slugging_percentage" REAL /* Team slugging percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_records" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was home or away */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "winning_pitcher" INTEGER /* ID of the winning pitcher */,
  "losing_pitcher" INTEGER /* ID of the losing pitcher */,
  "save_pitcher" INTEGER /* ID of the save pitcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_records_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach works for */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Coaching strategy or style */,
  "background" TEXT /* Background of the coach (e.g., Playing experience, Educational background) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the coach (e.g., Pitching, Hitting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the scout works for */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the scout (e.g., Pitching, Batting) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of scouting experience */,
  "background" TEXT /* Background of the scout (e.g., Playing experience, Educational background) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being traded */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team trading the player */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the player */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Details of the trade (e.g., Players exchanged, Draft picks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., League award, Team award) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance figures for the team's games */,
  "merchandise_sales" REAL /* Total sales from merchandise */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of mentions on social media */,
  "social_media_followers" INTEGER /* Total number of social media followers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the report (nullable) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Text of the analysis report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Scout, Analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contract_history" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who signed the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that signed the contract */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contract_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contract_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salary_history" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the salary */,
  "salary_year" INTEGER /* Year the salary was earned */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salary_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played in the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances in the game */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the game */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored in the game */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in during the game */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_records ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played in the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the game */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_records ("game_id")
)
